title: 6 ways sentiment analysis will help your business
summary:
The research shows that 56% of consumers believe businesses need a deeper understanding of what they want. Sentiment analysis enables businesses to better understand the needs, desires, and emotions of current and future customers. And in this article, we’ll walk you through how to use it in business, and what benefits it can bring. 

Artykuł 6 ways sentiment analysis will help your business pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI.
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
